bookreader-desc: ChâbuReihtuhpa cha wikipedia sitezy tawhta PDF/DjVu he châbu hawhpa lâta reina chhaichhi sâkha a châ.
byurl-placeholder: Wikipedia parawche tawhta PDF/DjVu URL sâkha roh teih
localfile-notice: Khâ hawpa faih châta deita anotata faih moh piena rai a hria aw.
no-javascript: ChâbuReihtuhpa cha JavaScript pahypa awpa â ngiah. Na browser kha JavaScript a pahnie ma tahpa nata taopathinazy liata chacha na pahy maw tahpa moh tua bei teih.
embebed-not-supported: Embed code cha châbureihtuhpa liata deichhy vei.
preference-saved: Na khotlyna cha pachô hawpa a châ!
integration-text: He chhaichhi lia thlai ta pahy theipa TLuana PDF/DjVu Wikihnawh Tluana hmiazy liata he chhaichhi icon shortcut he na khô thei.
